chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D- 358 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections 2. For orders on CMA 1485/24 3. For orders on CMA 1486/24 4. For hearing of main case 22-05-2024 None present for the petitioners. ***** This petition was filed on 05.04.2024 for quashment of FIR No.08 of 2024, registered at P.S, Bahoo Khoso-Jaccobabad, under sections 365-B, 452, 148 & 149 PPC, but even after lapse of one month, none has appeared to pursue the matter. Even today, no one has appeared and no intimation is received so far. Accordingly, this petition along with listed applications is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
